title: PeerGroupUpdate.role is an unbounded Option<String>
description: PeerGroupUpdate.role is Option<String> with no serde length guard. space_id, action, and contact_id are all guarded (deserialize_bounded_id / deserialize_group_action), but role is a bare Option<String>. A hostile peer can send a multi-MiB role string. Low-severity because role is optional and only set on 'role_change', but the pattern is inconsistent: every other string field in the same struct is bounded.
